name: Orange-Glazed Sweet-Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Slice potatoes about 1/8 inch thick and spread evenly in an 8-inch square dish.
3. In a separate bowl, combine orange juice, brown sugar, wheat germ, margarine, orange peel, cinnamon, and nutmeg.
4. Pour the mixture over the sliced potatoes.
5. Cover the dish with foil or a lid.
6. Bake for 1 hour, until the potatoes are tender.
